headline: Why The Western Digital (WDC) Story Is Shifting On New Earnings And AI Storage Expectations
summary: Western Digital sits at the center of a fast changing analyst story, with one updated framework lifting fair value estimates from about US$371.70 to roughly US$507.61 per share. Much of this reset is tied to fresh research where several firms have raised their price targets by US$70 to US$175, leaning on revised expectations for earnings power and demand for storage tied to AI related workloads. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives can shape the way you track...

headline: WD Advances Next-Generation Trusted Infrastructure with Industry’s First Post-Quantum Cryptography Hard Drives to Help Secure the Future of AI Data
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., May 18, 2026--Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), the storage foundation of the AI-driven data economy, today announced a significant step in next-generation infrastructure security with the integration of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) into its newest high-capacity Ultrastar® UltraSMR hard disk drives.
